name: tracekit
description: Codex plugin for setting up TraceKit APM, tracing, error monitoring, and debugging workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Install TraceKit across backend and frontend stacks from Codex.
interface.longDescription: TraceKit equips Codex with reusable setup skills for tracing, APM, error monitoring, live breakpoints, session replay, alerts, releases, and source maps across popular frameworks.
defaultPrompt: Set up TraceKit tracing in this project.
Add TraceKit error monitoring to this app.
Enable TraceKit session replay and source maps.
